target: 10. Tokiko in the Darkness
If you move, I'll kill you.
Ugh…!?
The copy was just a dummy… but…
It was lucky that the real gun was destroyed.
(The gun that Ushio destroyed was a copy!)
(The copied machine is just a useless replica unless the real one is destroyed…)
(I should have realized it was a decoy the moment I showed off the concealed self-defense gun that I should have kept hidden…)
Damn…!
Coming so carelessly like that… That's not like Ushio at all…
Tokiko…!
Shinpei… Did you act a bit recklessly?
You're right… I had the chance to notice. But…
You're saying you believed in me? Me, like this, a monster…
T… Tokiko… You…
The day after tomorrow… On the festival day, if I give the last meal, Haine's power will return, and my mother will be able to live longer.
It's not just my mother. I made Haine promise to ensure the safety of my brother and Mio as a condition for my cooperation.
But… because Ushio and Shinpei started doing extra things, everything went wrong.
No! Haine never intended to keep the promise! She planned to betray from the start!
If Ushio… If Ushio were here… You would have seen Haine's true nature!
If Haine planned to betray… What does that matter?
Because he's a bad guy… A liar, so he deserves to die?
Whether right or wrong, in the end, the strong one wins.
Tokiko… Do you even know what you're saying?
I know… But think about it…
Ordered… When I made the decision to become a shadow, I was confronted with facts that contradicted everything I had desperately believed…
I wasn't supposed to touch Mio, but she was copied without me realizing…
But… But that doesn't mean I can't resist! If I do, I don't know what'll happen to Mio!
W-What about me?
Haine's angry because of you!
Calm down, Tokiko! You can't keep fearing Haine forever! The future can be changed!
Then… Can't we change the future where Haine betrays me? Isn't that different?
T-That's a bit different…!
What's different? If I kill Ushio and Shinpei, Haine will be happy.
Then, maybe Mio and my brother will be spared.
Idiot! If Haine wins, everyone will die!
Ushio's already gone. The reason to believe my brother has disappeared.
…Tokiko!
If anything, make Mio and my brother into shadows like me.
As a shadow… I don't want that!
Relax. As a shadow, it's the same as the real thing.
Ah, if Mio becomes a shadow, the current shadow Mio has to be eliminated. That one's messed up.
If I ask Haine, he could make us forget this killing.
It'd be good to forget even that I'm a shadow, like my mother.
Then it'll be the same as when I was human. Enjoyably…
Lies! You don't think that!
Brother, be quiet!
You shut up! What you're saying is nonsense!!
Carrying a gun… You look really terrible.
But… That face… That face full of regret… Isn't that your true self?
It's too late…
There's nothing we can do anymore!
――What?!
Shinpei!!
(A shadow from Toki-chan… It's squeezing me!?)
(I can't move…!)
